agreement.title: Usage Agreement
agreement.subtitle: Please read and accept the following terms to proceed

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: These Terms and Conditions constitute a legally binding agreement between the Platform and any user. Accessing, registering, or using the Platform in any manner constitutes full and unconditional acceptance of these Terms.

definitions.title: Definitions
items: Platform: The website and any affiliated applications.
User: Any individual or entity accessing or using the Platform.
Seller: Any natural or legal person listing a product for auction.
Buyer: Any User placing a bid in an auction.
Auction: A competitive bidding process where price increases until closing.

nature.title: Nature of the Platform’s Role
items: The Platform provides a technical venue for listing products through auctions only.
The Platform does not own, store, or inspect any listed products.
The Platform does not act as agent or broker for either Sellers or Buyers.
The Platform is not a party to any sale contract concluded between Users.
The contractual relationship exists exclusively between the Seller and the Buyer.

seller.title: Seller Responsibilities
items: The Seller represents lawful ownership or legal authorization to sell.
The Seller is solely responsible for description accuracy.
The Seller bears full legal liability for the product.
The Seller agrees to indemnify the Platform against any claims.

buyer.title: Buyer Responsibilities
items: The Buyer is responsible for reviewing product details prior to bidding.
Placing a bid is a legally binding commitment if awarded.
The Buyer is responsible for payment arrangements directly with the Seller.

fees.title: Fees and Charges
items: Registration and use are currently free for a limited period.
The Platform reserves the right to impose future fees or commissions.
Users will be notified prior to any fee implementation.

realestate.title: Real Estate Exclusion
realestate.content: Listing or auctioning real estate (land, buildings, residential units) is strictly prohibited. Such listings will be removed immediately.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Products
prohibited.content: Prohibited items include weapons, narcotics, stolen goods, counterfeit currency, and any product violating Saudi Arabian laws.

aml.title: Anti-Money Laundering (AML)
aml.content: Users must comply with Saudi AML laws. The Platform may request identity verification and report suspicious activity to authorities.

general.title: General Provisions
general.content: The Platform is provided 'as is'. Intellectual property rights are reserved. These Terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and Saudi courts have exclusive jurisdiction.

acknowledgment.title: Acknowledgment
acknowledgment.content: The User acknowledges they have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms voluntarily and assume full legal responsibility for their activities.
